channel.title: Web-Scraping on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Web-Scraping on Arrans github.io

item.title: dgtlmoon/changedetection.io
item.description: Best and simplest tool for website change detection, web page monitoring, and website change alerts. Perfect for tracking content changes, price drops, restock alerts, and website defacement monitoring—all for free or enjoy our SaaS plan!

item.title: firecrawl/firecrawl
item.description: 🔥 The Web Data API for AI - Turn entire websites into LLM-ready markdown or structured data

item.title: Mintplex-Labs/anything-llm
item.description: The all-in-one Desktop & Docker AI application with built-in RAG, AI agents, No-code agent builder, MCP compatibility, and more.

item.title: getmaxun/maxun
item.description: Turn any website into clean, contextualized data pipelines for your workflows
